command:
echo '=== BRIDGE-EXECUTE VM REACHABILITY ==='
SECRET="moreno-bridge-2024"
for vm in vm-backups vm-openclaw vm-dashboard vm-hermes vm-ecosystem vm-memory; do
  result=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/bridge-execute     -H "Content-Type: application/json"     -H "X-Bridge-Secret: $SECRET"     -d "{"vm":"$vm","cmd":"hostname"}" 2>&1)
  ok=$(echo "$result" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('ok','?'), d.get('output',d.get('error',''))[:40])" 2>/dev/null || echo "parse_error: ${result:0:60}")
  echo "  $vm: $ok"
done
echo DONE_1888
